prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the soft, shaded golden style of image 2 to the overall circular icon shape. Then, color the four internal segments of the icon using the distinct quadrant colors (green, blue, red, yellow) from image 3.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which features a circular icon. Apply the soft, shaded golden style of image 2 to the entire circular icon shape. Then, color the four internal segments of the icon using the distinct quadrant colors from image 3: specifically, the top-left segment should be green, the top-right blue, the bottom-left red, and the bottom-right yellow.
objects: Soft, shaded golden style on the icon's outer boundary
Soft, shaded golden style on the icon's central cross-shaped separator
Top-left segment of the icon, green
Top-right segment of the icon, blue
Bottom-left segment of the icon, red
Bottom-right segment of the icon, yellow
